feature: Implement worktree features with comprehensive testing
workflow_rationale: Adding new user-facing functionality (5 slash commands, health check, tool caching, token tracking) to an existing stable codebase with 967 passing tests. Follows established patterns while introducing new standalone modules and extending existing ones.

phases.name: Standalone Utility Modules
phases.description: Create 5 new standalone Python modules with zero cross-module dependencies. Each module is self-contained and can be implemented independently. All must be stdlib-only.

subtasks.description: Create clipboard.py — cross-platform clipboard utility using subprocess (pbcopy/xclip/xsel/clip). Includes platform detection, error handling when clipboard utility is missing, and input sanitization.
Create diff_preview.py — multi-file unified diff generator using difflib.unified_diff (stdlib). Supports colored output (ANSI), binary file detection, and truncation at 500 lines.
subtasks.notes: Created diff_preview.py (228 lines) with generate_diff, generate_multi_file_diff, colorize_diff, truncate_diff, format_diff_output, is_binary_content, binary_file_placeholder, and DiffPreviewError. All 67 tests pass. Stdlib-only (difflib). Committed as e057ccd.

subtasks.description: Create token_tracker.py — per-message and session-cumulative token counting. Tracks input/output tokens, supports both Ollama (prompt_eval_count/eval_count) and Claude API (response headers). Includes estimated cost calculation for Claude (configurable rates, N/A for Ollama).
subtasks.notes: Created token_tracker.py (280 lines) with TokenUsage and TokenTracker classes. Supports Ollama (prompt_eval_count/eval_count) and Claude API (usage headers). Configurable cost rates, format_summary/format_table, serialization. All 45 tests pass. Committed as 22fc984.

subtasks.description: Create tool_cache.py — LRU cache for idempotent tool results with file-mtime-based invalidation. Cache key is tool_name:json.dumps(args, sort_keys=True). Max 256 entries with LRU eviction. Session-scoped (provides clear() method for /clear command).
subtasks.notes: Created tool_cache.py (270 lines) with ToolCache class using OrderedDict-based LRU, file-mtime invalidation, hit/miss stats, invalidate_file(), format_stats(). All 56 tests pass. Committed as bb775c3.

subtasks.description: Create health_check.py — startup health check module. Validates Ollama connectivity (HTTP GET /api/version), model availability (GET /api/tags), and disk space (>1GB free via shutil.disk_usage). Returns structured results with status codes (ok/warning/error). Non-blocking, color-coded output.
subtasks.notes: Created health_check.py (280 lines) with CheckResult, check_ollama_connectivity, check_model_availability, check_disk_space, run_health_check, format_check_result, format_health_check. Status codes: ok/warning/error. Color-coded output. All 42 tests pass. Committed as 703dbd2.

phases.name: Git Operations & Tool Base Extensions
phases.description: Extend existing git_ops.py with undo/diff methods and add cacheable property to the Tool base class. Mark read/glob/grep as cacheable.

subtasks.description: Add undo_last_change() to GitOps class. Checks both unstaged (git diff --name-only) and staged (git diff --name-only --cached) changes. Uses 'git checkout HEAD -- <files>' to revert both. Returns human-readable summary. Does NOT remove untracked files — prints note if any exist. Confirmation prompt if >3 files.
subtasks.notes: Added undo_last_change(confirmed=False) to GitOps class. Checks unstaged + staged changes, reverts via git checkout HEAD, returns summary. Skips untracked files with note. Confirmation gate for >3 files. 14 tests in test_undo.py all pass. Committed as 8a7805f.

subtasks.description: Add diff_working_tree() to GitOps class. Gets list of modified files from git, reads current and HEAD versions, generates unified diff via diff_preview module. Returns colored diff string. Handles binary files and truncation.

verification.command: python -m unittest tests.test_git_ops -v && python -m unittest tests.test_diff_preview -v
verification.expected: All tests pass including new diff_working_tree tests

subtasks.notes: Added diff_working_tree(color, max_lines) to GitOps class. Collects unstaged/staged/untracked files, reads current + HEAD versions via _run_git, generates unified diff via diff_preview module. Handles binary files (placeholder), deleted files, newly staged files. Color + truncation support. 14 new tests in test_git_ops.py all pass. Committed as e069acd.

subtasks.description: Add optional 'cacheable' boolean property to Tool base class (default False). Mark ReadTool, GlobTool, and GrepTool as cacheable=True. Do NOT mark bash/write/edit tools.

verification.command: python -c "from local_cli.tools.read_tool import ReadTool; assert ReadTool().cacheable == True; print('OK')" && python -c "from local_cli.tools.bash_tool import BashTool; assert BashTool().cacheable == False; print('OK')" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>&1 | tail -3
verification.expected: OK OK and all 967+ tests pass

subtasks.notes: Added cacheable property to Tool base class (default False). Overridden to True in ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool. BashTool/WriteTool/EditTool remain False. All 1238 tests pass.

phases.name: Core Agent Integration
phases.description: Wire tool_cache and token_tracker into the agent loop (agent.py). Update session.py for token metadata. This is the highest-risk phase — modifying the core agent loop.

subtasks.description: Integrate tool_cache into agent.py. Before executing a cacheable tool, check cache. After successful execution, store result in cache. In debug mode, log cache hits/misses to stderr. Pass cache instance through agent_loop() as optional parameter (backward compatible).

verification.command: python -m unittest tests.test_agent -v && python -m unittest tests.test_tool_cache -v
verification.expected: All agent tests pass (no regressions) + tool cache tests pass

subtasks.notes: Integrated ToolCache into agent_loop() as optional `cache` parameter (backward compatible). Added cache check before cacheable tool execution, cache store after success (skipping errors), debug logging for hits/misses, invalidation on mutating tool success, and _extract_file_path() helper. 16 new tests added. All 1254 tests pass. Committed as b124724.

subtasks.description: Integrate token_tracker into agent.py. In collect_streaming_response(), extract prompt_eval_count and eval_count from the final chunk (done=True) for Ollama. For Claude, extract from response metadata. Pass tracker through agent_loop() as optional parameter. Update _ReplContext to hold the tracker instance.

verification.command: python -m unittest tests.test_agent -v && python -m unittest tests.test_token_tracker -v
verification.expected: All agent tests pass (no regressions) + token tracker tests pass

subtasks.notes: Integrated TokenTracker into collect_streaming_response() and agent_loop() as optional parameters. Auto-detects Ollama (prompt_eval_count/eval_count) vs Claude (usage dict) via 'usage' key presence. Backward-compatible (tracker defaults to None). Added 11 new tests (Ollama/Claude recording, empty stream, stream error, keyboard interrupt, cache+tracker combo). All 1265 tests pass. Committed as 43aaac8.

subtasks.description: Update session.py to optionally include token usage metadata when saving sessions. Add token_usage field to saved messages (backward-compatible — old sessions without this field load fine). Update _ReplContext.__slots__ to add token_tracker and tool_cache attributes.

verification.command: python -m unittest tests.test_session -v && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>&1 | tail -3
verification.expected: All session tests pass + all existing tests pass

subtasks.notes: Updated session.py save_session() with optional token_tracker parameter that enriches assistant messages with token_usage field (backward-compatible). Added token_tracker and tool_cache to _ReplContext.__slots__ in cli.py. 14 new tests added (40 total session tests). All 1279 tests pass. Committed as 502509b.

phases.name: CLI Slash Commands
phases.description: Register and implement all 5 new slash commands in cli.py: /undo, /context, /copy, /diff, /usage. Each command follows the established pattern.

subtasks.description: Add /undo and /diff commands to cli.py. Register in _SLASH_COMMANDS dict. /undo calls ctx.git_ops.undo_last_change(). /diff calls ctx.git_ops.diff_working_tree(). Both check is_git_repo() first, wrap in try/except GitError. Return True to continue REPL.

verification.command: python -c "from local_cli.cli import _SLASH_COMMANDS; assert '/undo' in _SLASH_COMMANDS; assert '/diff' in _SLASH_COMMANDS; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added /undo and /diff to _SLASH_COMMANDS dict. /undo calls ctx.git_ops.undo_last_change(), /diff calls ctx.git_ops.diff_working_tree(). Both check is_git_repo() first, wrap in try/except GitNotInstalledError and GitError. Return True to continue REPL. Follows exact pattern of /checkpoint and /rollback handlers. Committed as ba39f07.

subtasks.description: Add /context command to cli.py. Displays message count, estimated tokens (using agent._estimate_tokens), compaction status (triggered/not triggered based on thresholds). Format: 'Messages: N | Est. tokens: ~X / Y | Compaction: not triggered'. Create test_context_command.py.
subtasks.notes: Added /context command to cli.py. Imports _estimate_tokens, _needs_compaction, _COMPACT_MESSAGE_THRESHOLD, _COMPACT_TOKEN_THRESHOLD from agent.py. Displays message count, estimated tokens with threshold, and compaction status. Added to _SLASH_COMMANDS dict. Created test_context_command.py with 13 tests. Committed as 6cddb0f.

subtasks.description: Add /copy command to cli.py. Copies last assistant response to clipboard via clipboard.py module. Edge cases: no assistant response -> 'Nothing to copy', clipboard unavailable -> 'Clipboard not available'. Create integration between cli.py and clipboard.py.

verification.command: python -c "from local_cli.cli import _SLASH_COMMANDS; assert '/copy' in _SLASH_COMMANDS; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added /copy command to cli.py. Imports ClipboardError, ClipboardUnavailableError, copy_to_clipboard from clipboard.py. Finds last assistant message in ctx.messages (reversed search). Edge cases: no assistant response prints 'Nothing to copy', ClipboardUnavailableError prints 'Clipboard not available', other ClipboardError prints failure message. Added to _SLASH_COMMANDS dict. All 1292 tests pass. Committed as 05c98f3.

subtasks.description: Add /usage command to cli.py. Displays per-message token breakdown and session totals from token_tracker. Format: table with input/output/total columns. Shows 'N/A' for cost when using Ollama. Create test_usage_command.py.
subtasks.notes: Added /usage to _SLASH_COMMANDS and handler in _handle_slash_command(). Uses ctx.token_tracker.format_table() for output. Handles None tracker and empty records gracefully. 13 tests pass (TestUsageCommand: 11 tests, TestUsageInSlashCommands: 2 tests). Committed as 179a980.

phases.name: Startup Health Check & Server Protocol
phases.description: Add health check to startup in __main__.py and add server-mode handlers for new commands in server.py.

subtasks.description: Integrate health_check.py into __main__.py. Run health check before REPL launch (after Ollama client creation). Print color-coded status lines (green checkmark/yellow warning/red X). Non-blocking: print warnings but don't prevent startup. Fast (<2s total). Skip health check in server mode.

verification.command: python -m unittest tests.test_health_check -v && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>&1 | tail -3
verification.expected: All health check tests pass + all existing tests pass

subtasks.notes: Replaced manual Ollama connectivity/model checks with structured health_check module integration. Imports run_health_check, format_health_check, STATUS_OK. Prints color-coded status lines. Non-blocking. Server mode skipped via early return. All 1305 tests pass.

subtasks.description: Add server-mode handlers for new commands in server.py. Add _handle_command() entries for /undo, /diff, /usage, /context, /copy. Use same logic as CLI handlers but output via _send() JSON-line protocol. Add tool_cache and token_tracker to JsonLineServer.__init__.

verification.command: python -c "from local_cli.server import JsonLineServer; print('Import OK')" && python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>&1 | tail -3
verification.expected: Import OK and all tests pass

subtasks.notes: Added server-mode handlers for /undo, /diff, /usage, /context, /copy commands in _handle_command(). Each handler mirrors CLI logic but outputs via _send() JSON-line protocol. Added ToolCache, TokenTracker, and GitOps to __init__. /diff uses color=False for JSON transport. /undo uses confirmed=True (no interactive prompt in server mode). /clear also clears cache and tracker. All 1305 tests pass. Committed as da3e61f.

phases.name: Integration Testing & Verification
phases.description: Run comprehensive verification: all existing tests pass, all new tests pass, import checks, regression testing. Ensure 80+ new tests added.

subtasks.description: Run full test suite and verify: (1) all 967+ existing tests pass, (2) all new test files discovered and run, (3) new test count is 80+, (4) total test count is 1047+. Fix any regressions found.
subtasks.notes: Full test suite verification passed. 1305 total tests, 0 failures, 12.1s runtime. 338 new tests added (283 in 8 new test files + ~55 in existing files). Original baseline: 967. All 8 new test files discovered and run. No regressions found. Committed as 730a146.

subtasks.description: Verify all new module imports work correctly. Test that no external dependencies were introduced. Verify backward compatibility: old sessions load without errors, existing tool execution unaffected by cacheable property.

verification.command: python -c "from local_cli.clipboard import copy_to_clipboard; from local_cli.health_check import run_health_check; from local_cli.diff_preview import generate_diff; from local_cli.token_tracker import TokenTracker; from local_cli.tool_cache import ToolCache; print('All imports OK')"

subtasks.notes: Comprehensive verification script (verify_subtask_6_2.py) passing 76/76 checks: all 10 new module imports work, stdlib-only confirmed (no external deps in local_cli/ or test files), session backward compatibility verified (old-format JSONL loads fine, new token_tracker metadata enrichment works), cacheable property correct on all 6 tool classes, all 5 slash commands registered with descriptions, cross-module integration points verified (agent_loop cache/tracker params, _ReplContext slots, save_session token_tracker param), all 8 new test files exist with proper test classes, all 5 new source files have docstrings. Full test suite: 1305 tests pass. Committed as 8a8000e.

subtasks.description: Code quality verification: check all new files have docstrings, type hints, follow module structure conventions. Verify no security issues (clipboard command injection, path traversal in diff). Run a quick manual review of all new code.

verification.instructions: Review all new files for: (1) Google-style docstrings on all public functions/classes, (2) Type hints on all function signatures, (3) No os.system() calls (use subprocess.run), (4) No eval/exec, (5) Clipboard input sanitized, (6) Diff preview doesn't allow path traversal

subtasks.notes: Comprehensive code quality review passed all 6 verification criteria. AST-based automated checks + manual review of all 5 new source files, 10 modified files, and 8 new test files. All public functions/classes have Google-style docstrings. All function signatures have type hints. Zero os.system/eval/exec/shell=True calls. Clipboard input properly sanitized (null bytes removed, length limited, stdin-only, list args). Diff preview has zero path traversal risk (pure difflib, paths from git only, /diff takes no args). 283 test methods across 8 new test files all have docstrings. 1305 total tests pass.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-3-core-integration and modify different files (cli.py vs __main__.py/server.py)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.3x faster than sequential (phases 4 and 5 run in parallel)

acceptance_criteria: All existing 967 tests pass without modification
80+ new tests added across 8 test files
All 5 new slash commands registered and functional
Startup health check runs without blocking
Tool caching shows hits in debug mode
All new code follows established patterns (docstrings, type hints)

verification_steps.name: New Module Imports
verification_steps.command: python -c "from local_cli.clipboard import copy_to_clipboard; from local_cli.health_check import run_health_check; from local_cli.diff_preview import generate_diff; from local_cli.token_tracker import TokenTracker; from local_cli.tool_cache import ToolCache; print('OK')"

verification_steps.name: Stdlib-Only Check
verification_steps.command: python -c "import ast, sys; [print(f'EXTERNAL: {n.names[0].name}') for f in __import__('pathlib').Path('local_cli').rglob('*.py') for n in ast.walk(ast.parse(f.read_text())) if isinstance(n, ast.Import) and not any(n.names[0].name.startswith(p) for p in ('local_cli', 'os', 'sys', 'json', 'pathlib', 'subprocess', 'tempfile', 'unittest', 'abc', 'argparse', 'readline', 'hashlib', 'math', 'sqlite3', 'uuid', 'datetime', 'typing', 'collections', 'difflib', 'shutil', 're', 'io', 'socket', 'threading', 'urllib', 'time', 'textwrap', 'platform', 'struct', 'signal', '_thread'))]; print('Stdlib check done')"

verification_steps.name: Existing Test Regression Check
verification_steps.command: python -m unittest tests.test_agent tests.test_git_ops tests.test_session -v 2>&1 | tail -5
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests pass for the 3 most-modified modules

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk due to modifying core agent loop (agent.py) and session management. 967 existing tests provide strong regression safety net. Each subtask has inline verification. Post-implementation integration testing catches cross-module issues.
